Hero.title: Precision metal machining & profile systems
Hero.subtitle: MPB manufactures custom parts and supplies the full BÖMA range across Bulgaria and Europe — machining, welding, laser cutting and modular conveyor solutions, tailored to your production.
Hero.videoAlt: Shop-floor production video (placeholder — real footage coming soon)

stats.label: From a single part to series production

Intro.title: Your partner for precision machining and industrial conveying
Intro.body: Metal Parts Bulgaria is a machine shop and the official distributor of BÖMA Maschinenbau und Automatisierung. We manufacture turned, milled, laser-cut and welded parts to order, and together with the aluminum profile construction kit we build modular conveying solutions — from a single part to entire lines in production halls.

Capabilities.title: A full spectrum of metalworking and assemblies
Capabilities.subtitle: From prototype to series production — machining, cutting and finishing under one roof.

items.title: Aluminum structural profiles
items.desc: Profile frames and load-bearing structures for machines and lines.

items.title: Machine frames
items.desc: Welded and assembled frames to drawing and application.

items.title: Conveyors
items.desc: Belt and roller conveyors, incl. rollers with integrated motor (motor-in-roller).

items.title: Workbenches
items.desc: Ergonomic assembly stations with cable ducts and accessories.

items.title: Turned & milled parts
items.desc: CNC turning and milling with tolerances down to 0.01 mm.

items.title: Laser-cut & engraved parts
items.desc: Precise laser cutting and engraving of metal.

items.title: Finished parts
items.desc: Stainless, non-ferrous, powder-coated and anodized parts.

items.title: Aluminum construction kit
items.desc: Profile frames and modules for endless configurations.

items.title: Conveyor belts
items.desc: Belt conveyors for unit loads, made to order.

items.title: Roller conveyors
items.desc: Speed up work processes and raise productivity.

items.title: Assembly workstations
items.desc: Ergonomic stations with cable ducts and accessories.

items.title: Protective fences
items.desc: Modular guarding for machines and zones.

Materials.title: We work with a wide range of materials

Specs.title: Precision and volume for every project

Equipment.title: In-house production and trusted partners
Equipment.body: We run most machining in-house and work with trusted external partners for specialized processes. We design and prepare production with modern CAD/CAM systems, and as an official partner of Boema.at we have direct access to Austrian engineering and genuine components.

Modu.title: Modu-System — modular conveyor center from one source
Modu.body: The heart of the BÖMA range: an aluminum profile system that adapts to your dimensions, speeds and angles. Combine modules freely — and expand as your production grows.
points: Adapt by dimension, speed and angle
Fast assembly with PV-40 precision connectors

Why.title: Speed, quality and Austrian engineering, delivered locally

items.title: Speed
items.desc: Fast lead times for prototypes and series production.

items.title: Quality
items.desc: Precision down to 0.01 mm and ISO 9001 certified production.

items.title: Hard-material expertise
items.desc: Experience with stainless, Inconel and non-ferrous metals.

items.title: EU-based
items.desc: Fast logistics for Bulgaria and across Europe, with English-speaking sales.

capabilities.title: What we make
capabilities.subtitle: Precision metalworking, welding, laser cutting and finishing — from prototype to series production under one roof.

products.title: The full BÖMA product range
products.subtitle: From the Modu-System aluminum construction kit to conveyors, roller tracks, lifts and protective fences — available across Bulgaria and Europe through MPB.

solutions.title: We deliver solutions built around your application
solutions.subtitle: We see ourselves as a solution finder for application-specific problems in industrial conveyor technology for unit loads — modularly prepared and adaptable.

about.title: The official voice of BÖMA in Bulgaria and Europe
about.subtitle: Metal Parts Bulgaria connects Austrian mechanical engineering with local manufacturers — with engineering competence, genuine parts and close service.

Solutions.procTitle: One partner from concept to service

steps.title: Consultation
steps.desc: We analyze your application, dimensions, speeds and angles.

steps.title: Engineering
steps.desc: We configure a modular solution from the BÖMA system.

About.storyP1: MPB was founded to bring BÖMA's proven conveyor technology to Bulgarian and European manufacturers — without language barriers, long lead times or missing support.
About.storyP2: As the official distributor we work directly with the factory in Alberschwende, Vorarlberg. That guarantees genuine components, up-to-date documentation and solutions engineered exactly for your application.

values.title: Engineering competence
values.desc: A technically trained team that designs the solution with you — not just sells a catalog.

values.title: Proximity and service
values.desc: A local contact, fast response, on-site installation and maintenance across Bulgaria and the EU.

values.title: Quality without compromise
values.desc: Only genuine BÖMA components, manufactured to ISO 9001 in Austria.

About.certBody: The entire BÖMA range is manufactured in Alberschwende, Austria, under an ISO 9001 certified quality management system — a guarantee of precision, traceability and reliability in every component we deliver.
